game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Only You Are Here**: Players explore a surreal, first-person environment, navigating with a virtual joystick for movement and swiping the screen to control camera perspective, interacting with objects and environmental puzzles by tapping them. The core gameplay involves discovering clues, collecting specific items, and manipulating the environment (e.g., opening doors, activating mechanisms) to progress through a dream-like narrative filled with psychological horror elements. Progression is non-linear, with player choices and discovered secrets influencing the path towards one of several distinct endings, requiring players to piece together the story from fragmented memories. Difficulty scales through increasingly abstract puzzles and the presence of unsettling entities that may require evasion or specific interactions to bypass, with failure potentially leading to a "bad" ending or a restart from a recent checkpoint.
game_info.description: You awaken in a surreal, fragmented world where memories and reality blur. Navigate through mysterious rooms, solve environmental puzzles, and collect memory fragments to piece together your story. Beware of the lurking Shadow Entity that hunts you in certain areas. Your choices matter—discover secrets, unlock different paths, and reach one of multiple endings. Will you uncover the truth, or remain lost forever?
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move forward/backward and turn left/right
Space: Interact with objects (doors, items, mechanisms)
Shift: Sprint (move faster)
Z: Use collected items on interactive objects
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (from start screen)
ENTER: Start game (from start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and navigation mechanics. Validates that the player can move through the environment, turn, and reach different areas without getting stuck.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Execute a systematic exploration pattern moving forward, turning, and visiting multiple rooms to ensure collision detection and movement work correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully navigates through multiple rooms without collision errors or getting stuck. Position updates correctly and player can access different areas of the game world.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal win strategy by collecting all required memory fragments and reaching the best ending. Validates complete game progression from start to win condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate efficiently to collect all 5 memory fragments in optimal order, avoid the Shadow Entity, unlock the final door using collected items, and reach the Transcendence ending.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully collect all memory fragments, unlock progression, avoid threats, and achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state with the best ending unlocked.
TEST_2.description: Tests the optimal win strategy by collecting all required memory fragments and reaching the best ending. Validates complete game progression from start to win condition.

TEST_2.expected: Successfully collect all memory fragments, unlock progression, avoid threats, and achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state with the best ending unlocked.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests interaction mechanics including collecting items, using items, and activating mechanisms. Validates inventory system and object interaction.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Deliberately interact with various objects, collect items, and use them on appropriate targets to ensure interaction mechanics work correctly.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Items are collected into inventory, can be used on appropriate objects, and mechanisms activate correctly upon interaction.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests evasion mechanics and Shadow Entity behavior. Validates that the threat detection and escape mechanics function properly.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Intentionally enter areas with the Shadow Entity, test detection range, and practice evasion by moving away or hiding.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Shadow Entity detects player within range, pursues them, and player can successfully evade through movement, demonstrating functional threat mechanics.
TEST_4.description: Tests evasion mechanics and Shadow Entity behavior. Validates that the threat detection and escape mechanics function properly.
TEST_4.strategy: Intentionally enter areas with the Shadow Entity, test detection range, and practice evasion by moving away or hiding.
TEST_4.expected: Shadow Entity detects player within range, pursues them, and player can successfully evade through movement, demonstrating functional threat mechanics.
